name: useLockScroll
description: Hook that locks scroll on an element or document body
examples: const { lock, unlock, value, toggle } = useLockScroll(ref);
const { ref, lock, unlock, value, toggle } = useLockScroll();

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target element to lock scroll on

source.source: * @param {HookTarget} [target=document.body] The target element to lock scroll on

tokens.name: [target=document.body]
tokens.description: The target element to lock scroll on

returns.name: Ref
returns.description: to attach to element, or locks body scroll by default

source.source: * @returns {StateRef<Target>} Ref to attach to element, or locks body scroll by default

tokens.description: to attach to element, or locks body scroll by default
